display.name: Lantern at the Split Path
display.short_description: A blue lantern hangs where no branch should. A voice inside it offers guidance if you answer, punishment if you force your way through.

choices.label: Answer honestly
choices.summary: Give the lantern the one truth you still cannot stop carrying, and the path ahead sharpens.

choices.label: Push through the light
choices.summary: Shoulder past the glow and let it rake through your chest before it lets you go.
